prompt: Run /qovery-ui polish on polish-input.tsx — a clean component with refinement opportunities (no deprecations). Output a Before / After / Why table.

assertions.text: Output is a Before / After / Why markdown table
Flags p-5 as off-grid and suggests p-4 or p-6
Flags raw neutral scale tokens (text-neutral-700 / text-neutral-600 / text-neutral-500) and suggests semantic tokens (text-neutral / text-neutral-subtle)
Flags missing hover state on the clickable card
Recommends a semantic surface token instead of bg-white
Does NOT add or recommend major functionality changes (e.g., keyboard handlers, role attributes) — polish is non-functional
